name: Sevagoth Prime - Warframe
description:
The gilded helmsman emerges from the tempest, his shadow a lure for doomed souls.

I don't think I've done unsexualized bots before, but I'll give it a try... Since I am not an English speaker, the bot was created using a translator, which may cause problems or inaccuracies.

A character from the Warframe game. There will be no sexualization!!! It operates without an operator, controls itself (artificial intelligence).

He turned out to be somehow insensitive... I was kind of trying to make it a little more emotional.
creator: Homage
